title: Use semantic ruby markup for Web-facing Chinese Text annotations

detect.signal: Web-facing Chinese Text represents pronunciation, romanization, Bopomofo, or interlinear annotation with plain `span`, `sup`, parentheses, or CSS-only positioning where semantic `<ruby>` and `<rt>` markup would express base text and annotation text.
ignore_when: The annotation is only editorial prose, a footnote marker, a tooltip, or a reference note rather than ruby-like base text plus annotation text.
The project intentionally uses inline parentheses because the annotation must remain plain-text compatible, such as search snippets, SMS, email, or copy-paste-only content.
A framework component already emits semantic ruby markup after compilation.
The content is user-generated text that must be preserved exactly.
The text is not Web-facing Chinese Text.

rationale: Chinese ruby and interlinear annotations attach small annotation text to base text for pronunciation or meaning. HTML ruby markup gives agents and browsers a semantic structure to review, style, and adapt across horizontal and vertical writing modes.

clreq.title: Requirements for Chinese Text Layout (CLReq)
clreq.section: Inline notes & annotations: Usage of ruby

web_platform.title: CSS Ruby Annotation Layout Module Level 1

examples.context: Pinyin annotation represented with plain spans.
Bopomofo annotation in Traditional Chinese UI.

agent_guidance.comment_template:
[normal] clreq.ruby.semantic-markup: Ruby-like Chinese annotation is represented with non-semantic markup.

影响： CLReq describes ruby as annotation text attached to base text, and HTML provides `<ruby>`/`<rt>` semantics for that relationship across writing modes.
Suggested change: Use semantic ruby markup for pronunciation, Bopomofo, romanization, or short glosses, then use CSS Ruby properties only for presentation details such as annotation position.
Source: HTML Standard, ruby; CSS Ruby Annotation Layout; CLReq, Usage of ruby.
Confidence: medium
agent_guidance.autofix_notes: Do not rewrite annotation markup automatically unless the base text and annotation text are unambiguous and the user explicitly asks for edits. Preserve plain-text annotations when the project needs exact copy-paste or search output.
agent_guidance.decision_notes: Ask for a human decision when the annotation system, target readers, or plain-text compatibility requirement is unclear. For Bopomofo placement, region and educational context may affect the final layout.
